summary: Both REQ-1 (mobile responsiveness) and REQ-2 (login button label change) appear to be implemented across the modified files. REQ-1 is addressed in Header, Footer, Home, About, Services, Clinics, SocialMedia, and ClinicCard with responsive Tailwind classes, touch targets, and stacking layouts. REQ-2 is addressed in Header.tsx with the 'Login' label on both desktop and mobile nav links. The AdminPanel page label change is mentioned in the build request but the diff does not show AdminPanel.tsx content confirming the label change there, though the file summary does not contradict it either.
